TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ni-hu-he'-zen "E'yi :–Ě–ł–≤—Ö–łÔľõDipun: „Éč„Éī„ÉēÔľŹ„Éč„ÉĖ„Éē" numalumanay a ngangan han Ci-li-ya-ke'-zen, u Si-puo-li-ya wali timl kitidaan nu yuncumincu, kakenihan i Hia-lun-cen sasa katukuh sacumud nu bayuan atu Ku'-ye'-daw amisan, aydaay nu E'-luo-se-lenpan a Ha-pa-luo-hu-se-ke' lilisan atu Sa'-ha-lin-cuo. . nina kitidaan u kacelahan nu kilakilangan, diheku ku lalud, sienaw ku kasienawan yadah ku suleda, Ni-hu-he'-zen u mibutingay ku kawaw nuheni, miadup, nipahabayan tu wacu ku sakaudip, mililis tu bayu tu lalaud, kasienawan mabulaw tayda i masaenalay. . lalangawan ŤĶ∑śļź sumamaday nu aydaay a cudadan, Ni-hu-he'-zen u tapangan utiih a kilimen, pibutingan nu daduducan nuheni, miadup tu i lilisay nu bayuan a mamuniay nu ukak a aadupan tu sakaudip, atu mitaduay tu mitengtengay nu wacu, misengi tu Kan-ca-cia subal a Kan-ca-cia-zen atu Ke-li-ya-ke'-cunan, tada nipisinzaan micapi tu Mea-cuo tipan amis a Sa-li-si-yi nu binacadan. . sipakayda i Tice-zenlei-sie atu mililiday amiadih, Ni-hu-he'-zen atu liwliway nu binacadan caay pilecad. aydaay a kaw-ku-sia-muosin sakamusa hatidaay tu nu sabaan a maudip namakayda i Way-pei-ciw-e buyuan nanay a Si'-se-ci' lalangawan, yu sumamad mikilul kunuheni tu babalaki mabulaw misaahebal taydan i Hei-lun-cin atu Ku'-ye-daw a kitidaan. . nina Si'-se-ci' lalangawan alaw awnu satabalay micumud i Min-cuo a lalangawan, itini i Pin-he zitay, Si'-se-ci' lalangawan maaymas kuni ka tayda i Si-puo-li-ya nu hatidaaytu nu picidekan a demiad nu kitidaan. . kilul sa tunika sumad nu demiad, mala nanum satu ku suleda, Tuon-ku-se binacadan maka nutipan mabulaw tayni, patuduan ku itidaay tu a yuncumin. Ni-hu-he'-zen mananam tu i tidaay a demiad ku nuheni caaya kaw mamasumad nu liwan a tademaw. . syakay Á§ĺśúÉ itini i " kay-yun-sin-ce" sa, Ni-hu-he'-zen sepat ku niyadu' nuheni: Nan-ciw-e, Hu-li-ci, W'-la' atu Na-y. mananam kunuheni siacawa tu calekakanaan, u sabana ku sakatusa a acawaan. u banges nu wacu ku dikuc, mukan tu heci nu wacu, lalud han u kines nu buting ku dikuc. Śú®" . Ni-hu-he'-zen tatayna ku yadah tu tatami, sabaw tu cacay a mihcaan taneng tu mikikung, tatayna han asi acawa tu wacu, kya taneng atu tademaw mikikung, sakamusa ci Ta-min-yi-tun, mala sepat ku Ni-hu-he'-zen, isasa nu Lia-lun-cen, sacumud nu Hei-lun-cen amisan nu subalan, Ku'-ye-daw idaw tu, E'-huo-ce'-ke amisan idaw tu. atu malalamel tu hekalay nu tademawan. lalut han i bayubayuan maudip, kasienawan han i buyubuyuan maudip. . keyday Á∂ďśŅü Ni-hu-he'-zen daduducen tu sakaudip han mibuting, miadup tu bayuay a aadupan, miadup i buyubuyu'an atu milami', atu pahabay tu tabakiay nu wacuan. wacu acacay ku pahabayan nuhini " nu cacaya a lalumaan tulu lima kunipahabayan". . ngangan nu Ni-hu-he'-zen ku buting tada kakanen nu heni. tu mihmihcaan mibuting tu kunuheni, u tapabaway talumaay nu buting ku dakepen nuheni, mahida u Kuy-yi atu Sen-yi, palahipuen nuheni mala kasienawan nu kakanen. . niyadu'śĚĎŤźĹ Ni-hu-he'-zen u mibutingay miadup ku kawaw nuhen, u sapahutinaw ku sakaudip nuheni, idaw ku laluday atu kasienawan a aenengan nuheni, nu tusaay atu wawaluay a lalumaan anikapulungan, nu sepatay a lalumaan ku yadhay. . satabakiay nu niyadu'an mapulung naming i Hei-lun-cen. nikay tidaan a mueneng amatenes itida, alahican malikid nu balat. patinaku cay-siw-cay-lim mihcaan atu cay-siw-num-wal a mihcaan tayniyan nu balat mamin malekep ku niyadu' nu Ni-hu-he'-zen. . kasaliwsiwan nu demiad, tatamaan nu niyadu' tahekal namin miadup, tatayna hantu milami i umaumahan. katukuh satu i kasienawan, mabulaw namin ku niyadu'ay a tademaw taydan i sawacan nu kasienawan a mueneng, mibuting itida. manamuh ku nuheni taydan nu labang, i pabaway nu Hei-lun-cen a tademaw Na-nay-zen hatidaay tu nu sienaw hnina tayda ku nuheni i Ni-hu-he'-zen palabang. .
S.PHON: ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn "…ô Ē~ °ji :******dipun: *******" numar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i-r~…ĺi-ja-k…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn, u si-puo-r~…ĺi-ja war~…ĺi timr~…ĺ kitidaan nu jun ¶umin ¶u, kak…ônińßan i ńßia-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn sasa katukuńß sa ¶umud nu bajuan atu ku Ē~ °-j…ô Ē~ °-daw amisan, ajdaaj nu …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ônpan a ńßa-pa-r~…ĺuo-ńßu-s…ô-k…ô Ē~ ° r~…ĺir~…ĺisan atu sa Ē~ °-ńßa-r~…ĺin- ¶uo. . nina kitidaan u ka ¶…ôr~…ĺańßan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, dińß…ôku ku r~…ĺar~…ĺud, si…ônaw ku kasi…ônawan jadańß ku sur~…ĺ…ôda, ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn u mibutiŇčaj ku kawaw nuńß…ôni, miadup, nipańßabajan tu wa ¶u ku sakaudip, mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu baju tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaud, kasi…ônawan mabur~…ĺaw tajda i masa…ônar~…ĺaj. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** sumamadaj nu ajdaaj a ¶udadan, ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn u tapaŇčan utiińß a kir~…ĺim…ôn, pibutiŇčan nu dadudu ¶an nuńß…ôni, miadup tu i r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nu bajuan a mamuniaj nu ukak a aadupan tu sakaudip, atu mitaduaj tu mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj nu wa ¶u, mis…ôŇči tu kan- ¶a- ¶ia subar~…ĺ a kan- ¶a- ¶ia-z…ôn atu k…ô-r~…ĺi-ja-k…ô Ē~ °- ¶unan, tada nipisinzaan mi ¶api tu m…ôa- ¶uo tipan amis a sa-r~…ĺi-si-ji nu bina ¶adan. . sipakajda i ti ¶…ô-z…ônr~…ĺ…ôi-si…ô atu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj amiadińß, ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj nu bina ¶adan ¶aaj pir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. ajdaaj a kaw-ku-sia-muosin sakamusa ńßatidaaj tu nu sabaan a maudip namakajda i waj-p…ôi- ¶iw-…ô bujuan nanaj a si Ē~ °-s…ô- ¶i Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ju sumamad mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ kunuńß…ôni tu babar~…ĺaki mabur~…ĺaw misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tajdan i ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun- ¶in atu ku Ē~ °-j…ô-daw a kitidaan. . nina si Ē~ °-s…ô- ¶i Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ar~…ĺaw awnu satabar~…ĺaj mi ¶umud i min- ¶uo a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, itini i pin-ńß…ô zitaj, si Ē~ °-s…ô- ¶i Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan maajmas kuni ka tajda i si-puo-r~…ĺi-ja nu ńßatidaajtu nu pi ¶id…ôkan a d…ômiad nu kitidaan. . kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tunika sumad nu d…ômiad, mar~…ĺa nanum satu ku sur~…ĺ…ôda, tuon-ku-s…ô bina ¶adan maka nutipan mabur~…ĺaw tajni, patuduan ku itidaaj tu a jun ¶umin. ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn mananam tu i tidaaj a d…ômiad ku nuńß…ôni ¶aaja kaw mamasumad nu r~…ĺiwan a tad…ômaw. . sjakaj ** itini i " kaj-jun-sin- ¶…ô" sa, ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn s…ôpat ku nijadu Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni: nan- ¶iw-…ô, ńßu-r~…ĺi- ¶i, w Ē~ °-r~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu na-j. mananam kunuńß…ôni sia ¶awa tu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakanaan, u sabana ku sakatusa a a ¶awaan. u baŇč…ôs nu wa ¶u ku diku ¶, mukan tu ńß…ô ¶i nu wa ¶u, r~…ĺar~…ĺud ńßan u kin…ôs nu butiŇč ku diku ¶. *" . ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn tatajna ku jadańß tu tatami, sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan tan…ôŇč tu mikikuŇč, tatajna ńßan asi a ¶awa tu wa ¶u, kja tan…ôŇč atu tad…ômaw mikikuŇč, sakamusa ¶i ta-min-ji-tun, mar~…ĺa s…ôpat ku ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn, isasa nu r~…ĺia-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn, sa ¶umud nu ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn amisan nu subar~…ĺan, ku Ē~ °-j…ô-daw idaw tu, …ô Ē~ °-ńßuo- ¶…ô Ē~ °-k…ô amisan idaw tu. atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu tad…ômawan. r~…ĺar~…ĺut ńßan i bajubajuan maudip, kasi…ônawan ńßan i bujubujuan maudip. . k…ôdaj ** ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn dadudu ¶…ôn tu sakaudip ńßan mibutiŇč, miadup tu bajuaj a aadupan, miadup i bujubuju Ē~ °an atu mir~…ĺami Ē~ °, atu pańßabaj tu tabakiaj nu wa ¶uan. wa ¶u a ¶a ¶aj ku pańßabajan nuńßini " nu ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan tur~…ĺu r~…ĺima kunipańßabajan". . ŇčaŇčan nu ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn ku butiŇč tada kakan…ôn nu ńß…ôni. tu mińßmińß ¶aan mibutiŇč tu kunuńß…ôni, u tapabawaj tar~…ĺumaaj nu butiŇč ku dak…ôp…ôn nuńß…ôni, mańßida u kuj-ji atu s…ôn-ji, par~…ĺańßipu…ôn nuńß…ôni mar~…ĺa kasi…ônawan nu kakan…ôn. . nijadu Ē~ °** ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn u mibutiŇčaj miadup ku kawaw nuńß…ôn, u sapańßutinaw ku sakaudip nuńß…ôni, idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺudaj atu kasi…ônawan a a…ôn…ôŇčan nuńß…ôni, nu tusaaj atu wawar~…ĺuaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan anikapur~…ĺuŇčan, nu s…ôpataj a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan ku jadńßaj. . satabakiaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an mapur~…ĺuŇč namiŇč i ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn. nikaj tidaan a mu…ôn…ôŇč amat…ôn…ôs itida, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mar~…ĺikid nu bar~…ĺat. patinaku ¶aj-siw- ¶aj-r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan atu ¶aj-siw-num-war~…ĺ a mińß ¶aan tajnijan nu bar~…ĺat mamin mar~…ĺ…ôk…ôp ku nijadu Ē~ ° nu ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn. . kasar~…ĺiwsiwan nu d…ômiad, tatamaan nu nijadu Ē~ ° tańß…ôkar~…ĺ namin miadup, tatajna ńßantu mir~…ĺami i umaumańßan. katukuńß satu i kasi…ônawan, mabur~…ĺaw namin ku nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tajdan i sawa ¶an nu kasi…ônawan a mu…ôn…ôŇč, mibutiŇč itida. manamuńß ku nuńß…ôni tajdan nu r~…ĺabaŇč, i pabawaj nu ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn a tad…ômaw na-naj-z…ôn ńßatidaaj tu nu si…ônaw ńßnina tajda ku nuńß…ôni i ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn par~…ĺabaŇč. .
S.FORM: Ni-hu-he'-zen "E'yi :–Ě–ł–≤—Ö–łÔľõDipun: „Éč„Éī„ÉēÔľŹ„Éč„ÉĖ„Éē" numalumanay a ngangan han Ci-li-ya-ke'-zen, u Si-puo-li-ya wali timl kitidaan nu yuncumincu, kakenihan i Hia-lun-cen sasa katukuh sacumud nu bayuan atu Ku'-ye'-daw amisan, aydaay nu E'-luo-se-lenpan a Ha-pa-luo-hu-se-ke' lilisan atu Sa'-ha-lin-cuo. . nina kitidaan u kacelahan nu kilakilangan, diheku ku lalud, sienaw ku kasienawan yadah ku suleda, Ni-hu-he'-zen u mibutingay ku kawaw nuheni, miadup, nipahabayan tu wacu ku sakaudip, mililis tu bayu tu lalaud, kasienawan mabulaw tayda i masaenalay. . lalangawan ŤĶ∑śļź sumamaday nu aydaay a cudadan, Ni-hu-he'-zen u tapangan utiih a kilimen, pibutingan nu daduducan nuheni, miadup tu i lilisay nu bayuan a mamuniay nu ukak a aadupan tu sakaudip, atu mitaduay tu mitengtengay nu wacu, misengi tu Kan-ca-cia subal a Kan-ca-cia-zen atu Ke-li-ya-ke'-cunan, tada nipisinzaan micapi tu Mea-cuo tipan amis a Sa-li-si-yi nu binacadan. . sipakayda i Tice-zenlei-sie atu mililiday amiadih, Ni-hu-he'-zen atu liwliway nu binacadan caay pilecad. aydaay a kaw-ku-sia-muosin sakamusa hatidaay tu nu sabaan a maudip namakayda i Way-pei-ciw-e buyuan nanay a Si'-se-ci' lalangawan, yu sumamad mikilul kunuheni tu babalaki mabulaw misaahebal taydan i Hei-lun-cin atu Ku'-ye-daw a kitidaan. . nina Si'-se-ci' lalangawan alaw awnu satabalay micumud i Min-cuo a lalangawan, itini i Pin-he zitay, Si'-se-ci' lalangawan maaymas kuni ka tayda i Si-puo-li-ya nu hatidaaytu nu picidekan a demiad nu kitidaan. . kilul sa tunika sumad nu demiad, mala nanum satu ku suleda, Tuon-ku-se binacadan maka nutipan mabulaw tayni, patuduan ku itidaay tu a yuncumin. Ni-hu-he'-zen mananam tu i tidaay a demiad ku nuheni caaya kaw mamasumad nu liwan a tademaw. . syakay Á§ĺśúÉ itini i " kay-yun-sin-ce" sa, Ni-hu-he'-zen sepat ku niyadu' nuheni: Nan-ciw-e, Hu-li-ci, W'-la' atu Na-y. mananam kunuheni siacawa tu calekakanaan, u sabana ku sakatusa a acawaan. u banges nu wacu ku dikuc, mukan tu heci nu wacu, lalud han u kines nu buting ku dikuc. Śú®" . Ni-hu-he'-zen tatayna ku yadah tu tatami, sabaw tu cacay a mihcaan taneng tu mikikung, tatayna han asi acawa tu wacu, kya taneng atu tademaw mikikung, sakamusa ci Ta-min-yi-tun, mala sepat ku Ni-hu-he'-zen, isasa nu Lia-lun-cen, sacumud nu Hei-lun-cen amisan nu subalan, Ku'-ye-daw idaw tu, E'-huo-ce'-ke amisan idaw tu. atu malalamel tu hekalay nu tademawan. lalut han i bayubayuan maudip, kasienawan han i buyubuyuan maudip. . keyday Á∂ďśŅü Ni-hu-he'-zen daduducen tu sakaudip han mibuting, miadup tu bayuay a aadupan, miadup i buyubuyu'an atu milami', atu pahabay tu tabakiay nu wacuan. wacu acacay ku pahabayan nuhini " nu cacaya a lalumaan tulu lima kunipahabayan". . ngangan nu Ni-hu-he'-zen ku buting tada kakanen nu heni. tu mihmihcaan mibuting tu kunuheni, u tapabaway talumaay nu buting ku dakepen nuheni, mahida u Kuy-yi atu Sen-yi, palahipuen nuheni mala kasienawan nu kakanen. . niyadu'śĚĎŤźĹ Ni-hu-he'-zen u mibutingay miadup ku kawaw nuhen, u sapahutinaw ku sakaudip nuheni, idaw ku laluday atu kasienawan a aenengan nuheni, nu tusaay atu wawaluay a lalumaan anikapulungan, nu sepatay a lalumaan ku yadhay. . satabakiay nu niyadu'an mapulung naming i Hei-lun-cen. nikay tidaan a mueneng amatenes itida, alahican malikid nu balat. patinaku cay-siw-cay-lim mihcaan atu cay-siw-num-wal a mihcaan tayniyan nu balat mamin malekep ku niyadu' nu Ni-hu-he'-zen. . kasaliwsiwan nu demiad, tatamaan nu niyadu' tahekal namin miadup, tatayna hantu milami i umaumahan. katukuh satu i kasienawan, mabulaw namin ku niyadu'ay a tademaw taydan i sawacan nu kasienawan a mueneng, mibuting itida. manamuh ku nuheni taydan nu labang, i pabaway nu Hei-lun-cen a tademaw Na-nay-zen hatidaay tu nu sienaw hnina tayda ku nuheni i Ni-hu-he'-zen palabang. .

si-puo-r~…ĺi-ja nu ńßatidaajtu nu pi ¶id…ôkan a d…ômiad nu kitidaan. . kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tunika sumad nu d…ômiad, mar~…ĺa nanum satu ku sur~…ĺ…ôda, tuon-ku-s…ô bina ¶adan maka nutipan mabur~…ĺaw tajni, patuduan ku itidaaj tu a jun ¶umin. ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn mananam tu i tidaaj a d…ômiad ku nuńß…ôni ¶aaja kaw mamasumad nu r~…ĺiwan a tad…ômaw. . sjakaj ** itini i " kaj-jun-sin- ¶…ô" sa, ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn s…ôpat ku nijadu Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni: nan- ¶iw-…ô, ńßu-r~…ĺi- ¶i, w Ē~ °-r~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu na-j. mananam kunuńß…ôni sia ¶awa tu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakanaan, u sabana ku sakatusa a a ¶awaan. u baŇč…ôs nu wa ¶u ku diku ¶, mukan tu ńß…ô ¶i nu wa ¶u, r~…ĺar~…ĺud ńßan u kin…ôs nu butiŇč ku diku ¶. *" . ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn tatajna ku jadańß tu tatami, sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan tan…ôŇč tu mikikuŇč, tatajna ńßan asi a ¶awa tu wa ¶u, kja tan…ôŇč atu tad…ômaw mikikuŇč, sakamusa ¶i ta-min-ji-tun, mar~…ĺa s…ôpat ku ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn, isasa nu r~…ĺia-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn, sa ¶umud nu ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn amisan nu subar~…ĺan, ku Ē~ °-j…ô-daw idaw tu, …ô Ē~ °-ńßuo- ¶…ô Ē~ °-k…ô amisan idaw tu. atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu tad…ômawan. r~…ĺar~…ĺut ńßan i bajubajuan maudip, kasi…ônawan ńßan i bujubujuan maudip. . k…ôdaj ** ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn dadudu ¶…ôn tu sakaudip ńßan mibutiŇč, miadup tu bajuaj a aadupan, miadup i bujubuju Ē~ °an atu mir~…ĺami Ē~ °, atu pańßabaj tu tabakiaj nu wa ¶uan. wa ¶u a ¶a ¶aj ku pańßabajan nuńßini " nu ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan tur~…ĺu r~…ĺima kunipańßabajan". . ŇčaŇčan nu ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn ku butiŇč tada kakan…ôn nu ńß…ôni. tu mińßmińß ¶aan mibutiŇč tu kunuńß…ôni, u tapabawaj tar~…ĺumaaj nu butiŇč ku dak…ôp…ôn nuńß…ôni, mańßida u kuj-ji atu s…ôn-ji, par~…ĺańßipu…ôn nuńß…ôni mar~…ĺa kasi…ônawan nu kakan…ôn. . nijadu Ē~ °** ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn u mibutiŇčaj miadup ku kawaw nuńß…ôn, u sapańßutinaw ku sakaudip nuńß…ôni, idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺudaj atu kasi…ônawan a a…ôn…ôŇčan nuńß…ôni, nu tusaaj atu wawar~…ĺuaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan anikapur~…ĺuŇčan, nu s…ôpataj a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan ku jadńßaj. . satabakiaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an mapur~…ĺuŇč namiŇč i ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn. nikaj tidaan a mu…ôn…ôŇč amat…ôn…ôs itida, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mar~…ĺikid nu bar~…ĺat. patinaku ¶aj-siw- ¶aj-r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan atu ¶aj-siw-num-war~…ĺ a mińß ¶aan tajnijan nu bar~…ĺat mamin mar~…ĺ…ôk…ôp ku nijadu Ē~ ° nu ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn. . kasar~…ĺiwsiwan nu d…ômiad, tatamaan nu nijadu Ē~ ° tańß…ôkar~…ĺ namin miadup, tatajna ńßantu mir~…ĺami i umaumańßan. katukuńß satu i kasi…ônawan, mabur~…ĺaw namin ku nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tajdan i sawa ¶an nu kasi…ônawan a mu…ôn…ôŇč, mibutiŇč itida. manamuńß ku nuńß…ôni tajdan nu r~…ĺabaŇč, i pabawaj nu ńß…ôi-r~…ĺun- ¶…ôn a tad…ômaw na-naj-z…ôn ńßatidaaj tu nu si…ônaw ńßnina tajda ku nuńß…ôni i ni-ńßu-ńß…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn par~…ĺabaŇč. .
